title: Farlands Reborn
description: This mod brings back the farlands in modern Minecraft versions.
body:
Farlands Reborn

What does this mod do?

This mod brings back the Farlands in modern versions of Minecraft by undoing the noise generator patches that removed the Farlands in the first place.
    The farlands spawn in at 12,550,821 blocks along the X or Z axis.
    They can be found in all three dimensions.
    If any other mod uses the vanilla noise generators to create custom dimensions, the farlands will likely spawn in that dimension too.

How is this different from other Farlands mods?

This mod works in the most recent versions of Minecraft, (1.18.x and above), unlike other mods which work mostly before the Caves and Cliffs update.
